aeo_readiness.summary: Atlas AC Repair has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and service pages, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO signals.
quick_wins: Generate and display customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Expand service pages with detailed content and relevant keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for better search visibility.

found: Service areas mentioned but not fully detailed
No clear Google Business Profile (GBP) signals
gbp_analysis.summary: The website mentions service areas but lacks detailed location-specific content. There is no evidence of an optimized GBP, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No GBP optimization or link on the website.
Lack of location-specific content and keywords.
No customer reviews or testimonials to enhance local credibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which harms local SEO.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and verify the business on Google My Business and other local directories.
Regularly update and monitor NAP citations for accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and GBP optimization
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Add location-specific keywords and content to service pages
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Build backlinks from local directories and industry-related websites

page_title: Atlas AC Repair - Fully Transparent Pricing
